name: Segment Tree
def: A binary tree over array ranges supporting O(log n) range queries and updates for associative ops.
problem: Answer range aggregates (sum, min, max, gcd) with updates, including range updates via lazy propagation.
mechanism: Each node aggregates a contiguous range; queries split into O(log n) covering nodes. Lazy propagation defers range updates until needed.
benefits: Range update + range query with lazy propagation
limits: More complex than a Fenwick tree
whenNot: Simple invertible prefix sums (Fenwick is leaner)
myths: "Overkill always" — for range-min/range-update it is the standard tool
